items.statcast_observation: Starling Marte produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 104.6 mph at a 35.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Cincinnati Reds, KC 3, CIN 4. Noah Cameron led the night, working 7.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 0 walks. Starling Marte supplied the loudest Royals contact at 104.6 mph.
items.title: Royals at Reds Recap
